cards.name: Lana's Aid
rules: Put up to 3 in any combination of Pokemon and Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

cards.name: Ultra Ball
rules: You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand. Search your deck for a Pokemon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Rescue Board
rules: The Retreat Cost of the Pokemon this card is attached to is Colorless less. If that Pokemon has 30 HP or less remaining, it has no Retreat Cost.

cards.name: Buddy-Buddy Poffin
rules: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokemon with 70 HP or less and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Artazon
rules: Once during each player's turn, that player may search their deck for a Basic Pokemon that doesn't have a Rule Box and put it onto their Bench. Then, that player shuffles their deck.
